rationale: ISO8601 test build failure with GCC 7; compiler compatibility issue, no spec behavior involved.
SSPI source files missing from release tarball; packaging/build issue, no spec behavior involved.
Build documentation fetches remote Sphinx inventory and fails with 404; build infrastructure issue only.
Clang compiler warnings about integer precision and va_copy; code quality, no spec behavior involved.
Aggregate ignores secondary read preference, returning 'not master'; server selection spec requires non-$out aggregate to route to secondaries.
Windows thread handle leak (CloseHandle not called); internal resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
GridFS find_one_with_opts does not initialize error struct on failure; internal API consistency bug, not a spec rule.
CI improvement to catch tarball build regressions on MSVC; build/testing infrastructure only.
GridFS readv returns -1 but mongoc_gridfs_file_error then reports no error; internal API state bug, no spec rule.
OpenSSL 1.1.0 deprecation warning for ASN1_STRING_data; compiler/compatibility issue only.
LibreSSL build failure due to missing X509_VERIFY_PARAM functions; build compatibility issue only.
cursor_is_alive and cursor_more return true after empty collection exhausted on MongoDB 3.2 find commands; cursor spec requires correct exhaustion state.
Child process calls shutdown() on parent's sockets on fork; platform/OS behavior issue, no spec rule violated.
Evergreen patch build fails with 'llvm-cov not found' on Darwin; CI infrastructure issue only.
Flaky mongoc_socket check_closed test on OSX; intermittent CI test failure, no spec behavior involved.
Documentation missing return type and has contradictory parameter lifetime statements; docs bug only.
size_t redeclaration error in VS2013 due to C99 partial support; build/compiler compatibility issue only.
Driver rejects hostnames >64 chars by using HOST_NAME_MAX; implementation limitation, no specific connection string spec rule names a 255-char max.
Mock server tests lock up on 32-bit Solaris/Linux; flaky CI tests, suspected mock server bug not driver behavior.
libbson build failure on mips/mipsel due to missing atomic sync builtin; build/portability issue only.
Setting sslclientcertificatekeyfile in URI does not enable SSL; connection string spec requires any ssl option to imply TLS enabled.
Documentation request for readPreferenceTags and mongoc_read_prefs_set_tags examples; docs improvement only.
CMake build fails when CXX compiler is /dev/null; build configuration issue only.
bson-decimal128.c directly includes stdint.h breaking old MSVC builds; build portability issue only.
mongoc_uri_set_option_as_utf8 bypasses appname length validation from handshake spec; driver may send oversized appname.
Coverity: getaddrinfo result leaked in example bson-streaming-reader.c; static analysis / example code resource leak only.
Driver lacks zlibCompressionLevel URI option defined in compression spec; missing required spec feature.
authSource validation fails silently without filling bson_error_t; error reporting implementation bug, not a spec behavior violation.
Evergreen CI improvement to upload multiple files at once; CI infrastructure only.
Environment flag to skip mock server tests in topology-specific CI runs; CI/test infrastructure only.
Coverity: out-of-bounds memcpy in mongoc-sasl.c; static analysis warning, internal implementation bug only.
Documentation improvement to co-locate libbson helper macros with underlying function docs; docs only.
Add undefined behavior sanitizer to CI testing; CI/build infrastructure improvement only.
Generated CMake files not listed in .gitignore causing dirty submodule state; repo hygiene only.
Sphinx token substitution broken in download URL in docs; documentation build issue only.
Intermittent TLS handshake failure in test_ismaster_ssl on Windows OpenSSL; flaky CI test, disabled as workaround.
Documentation improvement to note unused parameters in mongoc_client_command; docs only, no spec behavior change.
Documentation request to clarify what false return values mean for setters; docs improvement only.
Documentation request for server_id parameter in mongoc_cursor_new_from_command_reply; docs only.
Sphinx warning directive not rendered in HTML docs; documentation build/rendering issue only.
Documentation incorrectly states empty string returned for unset read concern (NULL returned); primarily a docs bug.
Coverity: always-true BSON_ASSERT in gridfs stream; static analysis warning, internal code quality only.
mongoc_gridfs_find_one_with_opts missing limit=1 optimization; performance issue, no spec rule violated.
mongoc_gridfs_file_get_upload_date truncates int64 on 32-bit systems; implementation bug, not a GridFS spec rule.
Cache SCRAM-SHA-1 ClientKey for performance; empty description, likely performance optimization not a spec conformance issue.
Client pool fails to connect to Atlas via TLS while single client succeeds; root cause is SNI omission (CDRIVER-2154), TLS implementation bug.
SNI not sent when allow_invalid_hostname is set; TLS implementation detail, not covered by a specific MongoDB spec rule.
Mock server code generator produces non-clang-format output causing diff churn; code generation/tooling issue only.
Pool mode fails to strip IPv6 brackets from '[::1]' before getaddrinfo; connection string spec requires brackets stripped for IPv6 hosts.
Sphinx 1.6 breaks doc build with 'symbol' extension warning treated as error; documentation build tool compatibility only.
